claudeSkillsDir.description: If set, agent-skills also syncs symlinks into this directory (e.g. ~/.claude/skills) without disturbing entries it did not create.

codexSkillsDir.description: If set, agent-skills also syncs symlinks into this directory (e.g. ~/.codex/skills) without disturbing entries it did not create.

skillPatchesFile.description: Repo-relative or absolute path to a pi-patches-style manifest of local skill text patches.

syncLocalSkillsToAgentSkills.description: If true, agent-skills also exports configured localSkills into agentSkillsDir as tracked symlinks without touching npx skills-managed real directories.
